name: Matching & Engagement
description: Swipe behavior analysis — match card views, swipe right/left ratios, match acceptance rates, super-like usage, boosted profile impact, and match quality indicators

name: Retention & Churn
description: User lifecycle analysis — registration-to-first-match funnel, onboarding completion, daily/weekly active users, session frequency, churn indicators, account deletion patterns, and re-engagement signals

name: Monetization & Premium
description: Subscription conversion analysis — premium page views, paywall conversion rates, subscription triggers, Elite feature adoption, purchase processing, retention offers, and revenue optimization
